scope.summary: Unifies retry classification on the pinned driver's connection-loss taxonomy, preserves a structurally lost session through the DB adapter, and permits exactly one safe replay of an idempotent stateless read.
out_of_scope: Pinned-session reconnect recovery; A4e owns that path.
The D5 live idle-kill lane and its Oracle-container evidence.
Changing the fail-closed SQL classifier or retrying mutations.

entry_points.name: stateless OraclePool read checkout
entry_points.trace: connection::tests::driver_connection_lost_taxonomy_reaches_the_db_error_boundary proves the real driver seam maps every pinned connection-loss ORA code and raw BrokenPipe to DbError::ConnectionLost; pool::tests::retry_policy_allows_exactly_one_immediate_retry_per_request proves a retry budget cannot exceed one replay.

entry_points.name: structured Oracle error response
entry_points.trace: error::tests::retry_envelopes_distinguish_fresh_connection_from_same_session and the full oracledb_contract integration test prove fresh-connection versus same-session remediation and the retained ORA code.

entry_points.name: core resilience classification
entry_points.trace: cargo test -p oraclemcp-core resilience::tests:: and cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test chaos passed; chaos::driver_connection_loss_and_package_reset_are_classified_retryable exercises the core re-export against lost-session and package-reset cases.

limitations: Scoped offline tests passed: cargo test -p oraclemcp-error retry_actions_keep_connection_loss_and_package_reset_distinct; cargo test -p oraclemcp-db driver_connection_lost_taxonomy_reaches_the_db_error_boundary; cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --test oracledb_contract; cargo test -p oraclemcp-core resilience::tests::; cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test chaos.
No Oracle live D5 idle-kill observation is claimed. D5 depends on the container harness and validates the pooled plus pinned recovery paths separately.
The full workspace gate was not a source-SHA proof for this close; this shared checkout still has unrelated in-flight panes.
